_readme: This file holds the Leadership & Team page cards (photo, name, role, description for the HOD, Faculty, Campus Ambassador, and each Core Team member) AND the Inauguration event page's heading/description/photo list. Everything else on the site (home page text, FAQ questions/answers, contact emails) is written directly inside its own HTML file, so open index.html / faq.html / contact.html to edit that content.

hod.name: Dr. Paavan Pandit
hod.role: Head of Department, Computer Science & Engineering
hod.description: Provides departmental oversight and institutional support for the Red Hat Academy program, ensuring it stays aligned with the department's broader academic and career-readiness goals.

faculty.name: Prof. Vestiya Ashokkumar Manilal
faculty.description: Acts as the faculty point of contact for Red Hat Academy, supporting the student core team with mentorship, scheduling, and coordination with the department.

ambassador.name: Dhairya Panchal
ambassador.description: Brought Red Hat Academy to our campus and formed the student core team. Serves as the main link between our chapter, the faculty coordinator, and the wider Red Hat Academy community.

event.heading: Inauguration Ceremony
event.description: Photos from the day our Red Hat Academy chapter was officially inaugurated on campus.

coreTeam.name: Harshvardhansinh S Jadeja
coreTeam.description: Builds & Maintains the official Program Website and Leading event management.

coreTeam.name: Shiv Jani
coreTeam.role: Core Team Member - Social Media & Content

coreTeam.name: Student Name 4
coreTeam.description: Sets up and troubleshoots the hands-on lab environments used in sessions.
